subcodes.first_line: O thou who art intoxicated with the wine of the Covenant! A cup of wine may bestow a momentary exhilaration, but afterward bringeth languor and causeth a racking headache; yet [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سرمست باده الست جام می دمی نشئه بخشد و مدتی خمار آرد و صداع اسرات کند ولی
subcodes.subjects: @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
